name: Salata Horiatiki (Country Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the tomatoes and cut them into bite-sized pieces.
2. Cut the cucumbers into slices or wedges.
3. Mince the onions and green peppers finely.
4. Cut the feta cheese into small cubes.
5. Place all the prepared vegetables in a large bowl.
6. Add the olives to the bowl.
7. Season with salt and pepper according to taste.
8. Toss everything together well to combine.
9. Serve with oil and vinegar dressing.
